final_prompt.prompt:
Create a social media cover image for a 小红书 (Xiaohongshu) post announcing that GPT-image-2 is now live on the Lovart platform.

Style/medium: needs a high-end editorial magazine aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be diagonal composition
Subject: must include the product launch announcement as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-contrast, punchy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a high-contrast accent color direction — exact hue and ratio are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: must preserve 小红书 cover format (vertical), both brand names clearly legible
Avoid:
